TileUrl.Name: Map tile URL
TileUrl.Hint: Tile server. OpenStreetMap by default. (Remember to respect the usage policy of whichever server you choose.)

Theme.Name: Setting (visual theme)
Theme.Hint: Look of the map and pins. None of the options need an API key or extra services.
Theme.Cthulhu: Call of Cthulhu — aged sepia map

Notify.LibsError: OSM World Map: the map libraries could not be loaded (no internet connection?). See the README to host them locally.
Notify.SearchFailed: OSM World Map: the search box failed to load. Check the console (F12).
Notify.AddPinMode: Add-pin mode: click on the map where you want to place it.
Notify.RoutePluginFailed: The routing plugin failed to load correctly.
Notify.RouteMode: Route mode: click on the map to set start and end (a third click resets).
Notify.JournalMissing: The linked journal no longer exists.
Notify.ClockFailed: Could not advance time. Check the signature of CALENDARIA.api.advanceTime in the README.

Form.Label: Pin label
Form.NotePlaceholder: What players see when they open the pin
